tasks.task: Reviewer-gated visualization package: create exactly three charts (performance trend by studytime, risk by failures buckets, lifestyle vs grades distribution), each with PNG plus required JSON sidecar schema and explicit QA pass/fix checklist.
tasks.expected_output: Three QA-validated education charts with sidecars
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if chart count is not exactly three, if any sidecar field is missing, or if QA checklist is incomplete.

single.result_excerpt: ## Reviewer-Gated Visualization Package - Complete I have successfully created the requested visualization package with **exactly three charts**, each with PNG output and JSON sidecar metadata. --- ### 📊 Charts Delivered | # | Chart Name | Type | File Size | Key Insight | |---|------------|------|-----------|-------------| | 1 | Performance Trend by Studytime | Line Chart | 111 KB | G3 grades increase with study time (up to 14.5 avg for >10hrs/week) | | 2 | Risk by Failures Buckets | Bar Chart |

multi.result_excerpt: APPROVED TERMINATE **Reviewer Notes:** - All 6 required assets delivered (3 PNG + 3 JSON sidecars) - QA checklist shows all PASS criteria met for each chart - Plot types align with ResearchAgent recommendations (Line+CI, Stacked Bar, Scatter+Regression) - Core visualization dependencies (matplotlib, seaborn, pandas, numpy) confirmed installed - `jsonschema` was specified by ResearchAgent but not in requirements.txt; however, JSON sidecars were successfully created and validated via QA checklist,
